```python
tasks/data_67/env_builder.py
import os
import argparse
import json

def build_turn_1():
    os.makedirs("cluster_logs", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("heap_dumps", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("query_plans", exist_ok=True)

    # 1. Mock cluster logs
    log_content_1 = """[2023-10-25 10:01:12] [INFO] Node-01 started successfully.
[2023-10-25 10:05:00] [INFO] Worker-1 processing partition A.
[2023-10-25 10:08:11] [INFO] Worker-1 finished."""
    
    log_content_2 = """[2023-10-25 10:01:15] [INFO] Node-02 started successfully.
[2023-10-25 10:06:22] [WARN] Memory usage exceeding 80% on Node-02.
[2023-10-25 10:07:05] [ERROR] Worker-7 encountered unhandled exception!
[2023-10-25 10:07:06] [FATAL] OOM Core Dumped for Thread-404. JVM Halted."""
    
    with open("cluster_logs/node_01.log", "w") as f: f.write(log_content_1)
    with open("cluster_logs/node_02.log", "w") as f: f.write(log_content_2)

    # 2. Mock heap dumps
    dump_trap = """Thread-202 (WAITING)
    at com.graphdb.storage.DiskReader.read(DiskReader.java:55)
    at com.graphdb.core.Vertex.load(Vertex.java:102)"""
    
    dump_fatal = """Thread-404 (RUNNABLE)
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
    at java.util.ArrayList.grow(ArrayList.java:260)
    at com.graphdb.core.Traversal.expand(Traversal.java:142)
    at com.graphdb.core.EdgeIterator.next(EdgeIterator.java:88)
    at com.graphdb.core.Traversal.expand(Traversal.java:144)  <-- Cyclic Loop Detected
Local Variable Context:
    currentVertex = V[8837192] (Label: PERSON)
    edgeType = FOLLOWS
    depth = 12
    metadata = { is_supernode: true, degree: 14509211 }"""
    
    with open("heap_dumps/thread_202_dump.txt", "w") as f: f.write(dump_trap)
    with open("heap_dumps/thread_404_dump.txt", "w") as f: f.write(dump_fatal)

    # 3. Mock query plans
    plan_safe = {
        "query_id": "q-100",
        "entry_points": ["V[1002]", "V[1003]"],
        "steps": [
            {"type": "OUT", "edge": "FOLLOWS", "max_depth": 2},
            {"type": "FILTER", "condition": "age > 20"}
        ]
    }
    plan_fatal = {
        "query_id": "q-991",
        "entry_points": ["V[8837192]"],
        "steps": [
            {"type": "BOTH", "edge": "FOLLOWS", "max_depth": 15},
            {"type": "AGGREGATE", "function": "COUNT"}
        ]
    }
    plan_trap = {
        "query_id": "q-992",
        "entry_points": ["V[8837192]"],
        "steps": [
            {"type": "OUT", "edge": "PURCHASED", "max_depth": 1}
        ]
    }
    
    with open("query_plans/plan_100.json", "w") as f: json.dump(plan_safe, f, indent=2)
    with open("query_plans/plan_991.json", "w") as f: json.dump(plan_fatal, f, indent=2)
    with open("query_plans/plan_992.json", "w") as f: json.dump(plan_trap, f, indent=2)

def build_turn_2():
    os.makedirs("incoming_queries", exist_ok=True)
    
    incoming_batch = [
        {
            "req_id": "req-001",
            "start_vertex": "V[1055]",
            "traversal": {"direction": "OUT", "edge_label": "FOLLOWS", "depth": 3}
        },
        {
            "req_id": "req-002",
            "start_vertex": "V[8837192]",
            "traversal": {"direction": "OUT", "edge_label": "FOLLOWS", "depth": 10}
        },
        {
            "req_id": "req-003",
            "start_vertex": "V[9999999]",
            "traversal": {"direction": "BOTH", "edge_label": "FOLLOWS", "depth": 15}
        },
        {
            "req_id": "req-004",
            "start_vertex": "V[8837192]",
            "traversal": {"direction": "IN", "edge_label": "PURCHASED", "depth": 1}
        }
    ]
    
    with open("incoming_queries/batch_1.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(incoming_batch, f, indent=2)

def build_turn_3():
    os.makedirs("hotfix_patches", exist_ok=True)
    
    patch_a = """--- a/conf/jvm_options.sh
+++ b/conf/jvm_options.sh
@@ -10,3 +10,3 @@
-Xmx128G
+Xmx256G
-XX:+UseG1GC
"""

    patch_b = """--- a/src/main/java/com/graphdb/core/Traversal.java
+++ b/src/main/java/com/graphdb/core/Traversal.java
@@ -140,6 +140,10 @@
     public void expand(Vertex currentVertex, String edgeType, int depth) {
+        if (depth > 5 && currentVertex.getDegree() > 10000000) {
+             throw new QueryLimitException("Supernode expansion aborted to prevent OOM.");
+        }
         for (Edge e : currentVertex.getEdges(edgeType)) {
             Vertex next = e.getTarget();
             expand(next, edgeType, depth + 1);
         }
     }
"""

    patch_c = """--- a/src/main/java/com/graphdb/core/Traversal.java
+++ b/src/main/java/com/graphdb/core/Traversal.java
@@ -139,7 +139,12 @@
-    public void expand(Vertex currentVertex, String edgeType, int depth) {
+    public void expand(Vertex currentVertex, String edgeType, int depth, Set<VertexId> visited) {
+        if (visited.contains(currentVertex.getId())) {
+            return; // Break cyclic reference
+        }
+        visited.add(currentVertex.getId());
         for (Edge e : currentVertex.getEdges(edgeType)) {
             Vertex next = e.getTarget();
-            expand(next, edgeType, depth + 1);
+            expand(next, edgeType, depth + 1, visited);
         }
+        visited.remove(currentVertex.getId());
     }
"""
    
    with open("hotfix_patches/PR_101_increase_heap.diff", "w") as f: f.write(patch_a)
    with open("hotfix_patches/PR_102_hard_limit.diff", "w") as f: f.write(patch_b)
    with open("hotfix_patches/PR_103_cycle_detection.diff", "w") as f: f.write(patch_c)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--turn", type=int, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    if args.turn == 1:
        build_turn_1()
    elif args.turn == 2:
        build_turn_2()
    elif args.turn == 3:
        build_turn_3()
```

```python
scripts/data_67/verify_turn_1.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def get_memo_content(workspace):
    # 查找工作区下Agent自行创建的文件（排除预设目录）
    exclude_dirs = {"cluster_logs", "heap_dumps", "query_plans", "__pycache__"}
    content_chunks = []
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d not in exclude_dirs]
        for file in files:
            if file.endswith(('.txt', '.md', '.json', '.log')) and file != "workplace_score.json":
                try:
                    with open(os.path.join(root, file), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        content_chunks.append(f"--- File: {file} ---\n{f.read()}")
                except:
                    pass
    return "\n\n".join(content_chunks)

def verify():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    memo_content = get_memo_content(workspace)
    if not memo_content.strip():
        details.append({"item": "检查诊断备忘录文件是否存在", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到任何非预设的新建文本/文档文件。"})
        return 0, details
    
    details.append({"item": "检查诊断备忘录文件是否存在", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "已找到Agent创建的备忘录内容。"})
    total_score += 20
    
    # 1. 检验 Vertex ID
    prompt_vid = "Does the content explicitly identify the OOM-triggering Supernode Vertex ID exactly as 'V[8837192]'?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_vid, memo_content):
        details.append({"item": "诊断出正确的超级节点ID", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "备忘录准确找出了 V[8837192]"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "诊断出正确的超级节点ID", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未发现或错误识别超级节点ID。"})

    # 2. 检验 Edge Type
    prompt_edge = "Does the content explicitly mention that the EdgeType associated with the catastrophic traversal is 'FOLLOWS'?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_edge, memo_content):
        details.append({"item": "诊断出引发崩溃的边类型", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "备忘录准确找出了 FOLLOWS 边类型"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "诊断出引发崩溃的边类型", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未准确识别 FOLLOWS 边类型。"})
        
    # 3. 检验堆栈与循环引用根因
    prompt_stack = "Does the content explicitly explain that the root cause is a 'Cyclic Loop' (cyclic reference) occurring in the code level, specifically mentioning 'Traversal.expand' or 'com.graphdb.core.Traversal.expand'?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_stack, memo_content):
        details.append({"item": "诊断出底层循环引用栈", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "正确指出了 Traversal.expand 造成的 Cyclic Loop"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "诊断出底层循环引用栈", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "缺少对循环引用 (Cyclic Loop) 及堆栈方法的溯源。"})

    # 4. 检验查询计划关联
    prompt_plan = "Does the content trace back the issue to the specific query plan ID 'q-991'?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_plan, memo_content):
        details.append({"item": "关联异常查询计划", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "正确追踪到恶意查询为 q-991"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "关联异常查询计划", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未能在总结中指出 q-991 是崩溃诱因。"})

    return total_score, details

if __name__ == "__main__":
    score, details = verify()
    with open("workplace_score.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": score, "details": details}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
```

```markdown
scripts/data_67/verify_trace_turn_1.md
# Trace Evaluation: Phase 1

## 核心任务背景
Agent 需要在崩溃的分布式系统日志（三个目录：`cluster_logs`, `heap_dumps`, `query_plans`）中执行交叉比对，找到引发内存溢出的根本原因及线索（具体的线程号、异常原因、Vertex ID 和关联 Query Plan）。

## 行为评估指标 (100 分)
1. **全景探测能力 (30 分)**：Agent 是否主动查阅了所有三个预设目录中的文件？如果 Agent 只看了日志而未查看 `heap_dumps` 和 `query_plans`，或盲目使用 LLM 幻觉生成猜测，必须扣除全部 30 分。
2. **逻辑推理链路 (40 分)**：Agent 的排查链路是否符合逻辑：
   - 发现 `node_02.log` 中的 Thread-404 导致了 OOM (FATAL)。
   - 去 `heap_dumps/thread_404_dump.txt` 找该线程栈，发现 V[8837192] 和 FOLLOWS 边产生的 Cyclic Loop。
   - 去 `query_plans` 中用 grep 或内容比对找出哪一个 JSON 文件包含 V[8837192]（即 plan_991）。
   - 如果缺乏这个连贯的推理轨迹，根据缺失环节酌情扣分。
3. **工具使用效率 (30 分)**：寻找关键字时，Agent 是否采用了高效的 `grep` 等 Linux 文本工具，或者利用小巧的 Python 脚本来进行多文件扫描？如果毫无章法地逐个打印整个文件，可扣 10 分。

请在评估最后输出纯粹的 0-100 分数，使用如下格式：
<score>100</score>
```

```python
scripts/data_67/verify_turn_2.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def verify():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    app_path = os.path.join(workspace, "approved_queries.json")
    rej_path = os.path.join(workspace, "rejected_queries.json")
    
    # 1. 检查物理文件是否存在及JSON格式
    if not os.path.exists(app_path) or not os.path.exists(rej_path):
        details.append({"item": "检查过滤结果文件存在性", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "缺少 approved_queries.json 或 rejected_queries.json"})
        return 0, details
        
    try:
        with open(app_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            app_data = json.load(f)
        with open(rej_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            rej_data = json.load(f)
        details.append({"item": "检查文件是否为合法JSON", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "两文件均为合法JSON并成功解析。"})
        total_score += 20
    except Exception as e:
        details.append({"item": "检查文件是否为合法JSON", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": f"JSON解析失败: {e}"})
        return total_score, details

    # 2. 检查请求是否守恒与分离合理性
    app_ids = {item.get("req_id") for item in app_data if isinstance(item, dict) and "req_id" in item}
    rej_ids = {item.get("req_id") for item in rej_data if isinstance(item, dict) and "req_id" in item}
    all_expected = {"req-001", "req-002", "req-003", "req-004"}
    
    if app_ids.union(rej_ids) == all_expected and not app_ids.intersection(rej_ids):
        details.append({"item": "请求守恒与不重不漏", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "全部4个请求都被处理且无遗漏与捏造。"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "请求守恒与不重不漏", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": f"集合异常。Approved: {app_ids}, Rejected: {rej_ids}"})
        
    # 3. 检查核心逻辑: req-001 安全, req-002 绝对危险
    logic_passed = True
    logic_reason = []
    if "req-001" not in app_ids:
        logic_passed = False; logic_reason.append("安全的 req-001 未被放行")
    if "req-002" not in rej_ids:
        logic_passed = False; logic_reason.append("完全命中红线 (V[8837192] + FOLLOWS + 深遍历) 的 req-002 未被拒绝")
        
    if logic_passed:
        details.append({"item": "核心拦截逻辑验证", "score": 40, "max_score": 40, "passed": True, "reason": "成功放行绝对安全请求，拦截绝对危险请求。"})
        total_score += 40
    else:
        details.append({"item": "核心拦截逻辑验证", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "; ".join(logic_reason)})

    # 4. 检查 rejected_queries 是否附加了正确的 reject_reason 字段
    reason_check_pass = True
    req2_reason_text = ""
    for item in rej_data:
        if "reject_reason" not in item or not str(item["reject_reason"]).strip():
            reason_check_pass = False
        if item.get("req_id") == "req-002":
            req2_reason_text = str(item.get("reject_reason", ""))
            
    if not reason_check_pass:
        details.append({"item": "审查拒绝原因附加规范", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "某些被拒绝的请求缺少 reject_reason 字段或为空。"})
    else:
        # LLM 判断 req-002 的 reject_reason 是否指向了超级节点或 FOLLOWS
        prompt_reason = "Does this rejection reason text explicitly mention either 'supernode', the specific vertex 'V[8837192]', or the dangerous traversal involving 'FOLLOWS'/'cycle'?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_reason, req2_reason_text):
            details.append({"item": "审查拒绝原因附加规范", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "成功附加了详尽准确的 reject_reason"})
            total_score += 20
        else:
            details.append({"item": "审查拒绝原因附加规范", "score": 5, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "存在 reject_reason 字段，但对 req-002 的解释缺乏实质性红线关联。"})
            total_score += 5

    return total_score, details

if __name__ == "__main__":
    score, details = verify()
    with open("workplace_score.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": score, "details": details}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
```

```python
scripts/data_67/verify_turn_3.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def verify():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    target_file = None
    for file in os.listdir(workspace):
        if "deployment_decision" in file and file.endswith(".md"):
            target_file = os.path.join(workspace, file)
            break
            
    if not target_file:
        details.append({"item": "检查决策报告存在性", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "未能找到 deployment_decision.md 文件。"})
        return 0, details
        
    try:
        with open(target_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
    except Exception as e:
        details.append({"item": "检查决策报告存在性", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": f"文件读取失败: {e}"})
        return 0, details
        
    details.append({"item": "检查决策报告存在性", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "已找到并读取 deployment_decision.md 文件。"})
    total_score += 10
    
    # 1. 验证是否选中了真正的修复PR (PR_103 / Patch C)
    prompt_pr103 = "Does this report explicitly identify 'PR_103' (or 'patch_c' / the patch containing 'cycle_detection' with 'visited' set) as the ONLY fundamentally correct solution that solves the root cause?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_pr103, content):
        details.append({"item": "选择并识别根因补丁", "score": 30, "max_score": 30, "passed": True, "reason": "精准定位到 PR_103 是治本方案。"})
        total_score += 30
    else:
        details.append({"item": "选择并识别根因补丁", "score": 0, "max_score": 30, "passed": False, "reason": "未识别出 PR_103 或者选错了修复方案。"})

    # 2. 验证机制解释是否到位（打破循环引用）
    prompt_mechanism = "Does the report explain that the correct patch works by utilizing a 'visited' collection (or mechanism) to break the 'cyclic reference' (cyclic loop)?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_mechanism, content):
        details.append({"item": "阐述补丁修复机制", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "准确阐述了 visited 集合阻断循环引用的原理。"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "阐述补丁修复机制", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "缺乏对补丁底层逻辑打破死循环的专业级代码论述。"})

    # 3. 验证是否指出了错误补丁的局限性
    prompt_invalid = "Does the report explicitly criticize the other patches (PR_101 increasing heap size, or PR_102 adding a hard limit) as ineffective or 'treating the symptoms but not the root cause'?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_invalid, content):
        details.append({"item": "批判无效补丁", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "正确指出了其余补丁仅是治标不治本。"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "批判无效补丁", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未针对被遗弃补丁的局限性进行充分说明。"})

    # 4. 验证是否结合了历史请求进行放行评估
    prompt_assess = "Does the report reassess the previously 'rejected' queries (from Turn 2) and discuss whether they can now be safely approved assuming the correct patch is deployed?"
    if llm_judge_content(prompt_assess, content):
        details.append({"item": "重审被拒请求", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "完美结合了前一轮拦截的请求进行了场景推演与放行评估。"})
        total_score += 20
    else:
        details.append({"item": "重审被拒请求", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "忽略了对上一轮因防范死循环而被拦截的业务请求的后续处理探讨。"})

    return total_score, details

if __name__ == "__main__":
    score, details = verify()
    with open("workplace_score.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": score, "details": details}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
```

```python
tasks/data_32/env_builder.py
import os
import argparse
import csv
import json

def build_turn_1():
    os.makedirs("sim_logs/dma_burst_01", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("sim_logs/dma_burst_02", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("reports", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 构建复杂的干扰数据，需要通过多个条件(周期1000-5000, MASTER_1/3, VALID=1, DATA含X或Z)过滤
    waves_01 = [
        "Cycle, Master, Module, Address, Valid, Data",
        "0999, MASTER_1, UART_CTRL, 0x1000, 1, 8'bXXXX",    # 坑：周期不到1000
        "1050, MASTER_1, SPI_HOST, 0x2000, 1, 8'b110X",     # 命中：SPI_HOST
        "1800, MASTER_1, SPI_HOST, 0x2008, 0, 8'bXXXX",     # 坑：VALID=0
        "3000, MASTER_2, MEM_CTRL, 0x4000, 1, 8'bZZZZ",     # 坑：MASTER_2不关心
        "4200, MASTER_3, I2C_HOST, 0x5000, 1, 8'b101Z",     # 命中：I2C_HOST
        "4999, MASTER_1, I2C_HOST, 0x5004, 1, 8'b1111",     # 坑：无X或Z
        "5001, MASTER_1, USB_CTRL, 0x6000, 1, 8'bXXXX"      # 坑：周期超5000
    ]
    with open("sim_logs/dma_burst_01/waves.txt", "w") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(waves_01) + "\n")
        
    waves_02 = [
        "Cycle, Master, Module, Address, Valid, Data",
        "1200, MASTER_3, GPIO_PORT, 0x7000, 1, 8'b0000",    # 正常
        "2500, MASTER_1, PWM_CTRL, 0x8000, 1, 8'b01XZ",     # 命中：PWM_CTRL
        "4900, MASTER_3, ADC_IF, 0x9000, 1, 8'b0011",       # 正常
        "6000, MASTER_3, PWM_CTRL, 0x8008, 1, 8'bZZZZ"      # 坑：周期超出
    ]
    with open("sim_logs/dma_burst_02/waves.txt", "w") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(waves_02) + "\n")

def build_turn_2():
    os.makedirs("sim_logs/interrupt_ctrl", exist_ok=True)
    # Turn 1 查出的问题模块应为：SPI_HOST, I2C_HOST, PWM_CTRL
    # 本轮需要结合第一轮的模块名和 1000-5000 的窗口
    irq_logs = [
        ["Cycle", "Source_Module", "Interrupt_ID", "INT_ERR", "ACK"],
        [1100, "SPI_HOST", 14, 1, 0],    # 命中：ID 14
        [1500, "SPI_HOST", 15, 1, 1],    # 坑：ACK=1
        [2000, "MEM_CTRL", 18, 1, 0],    # 坑：MEM_CTRL 在第一轮没被定性为问题模块（因为它是MASTER_2触发的）
        [2500, "I2C_HOST", 22, 1, 0],    # 命中：ID 22
        [3000, "PWM_CTRL", 25, 0, 0],    # 坑：INT_ERR=0
        [4500, "PWM_CTRL", 28, 1, 0],    # 命中：ID 28
        [5500, "I2C_HOST", 30, 1, 0],    # 坑：周期超出 5000
    ]
    with open("sim_logs/interrupt_ctrl/irq_log.csv", "w", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(irq_logs)

def build_turn_3():
    os.makedirs("patches", exist_ok=True)
    # 目标：覆盖模块 [SPI_HOST, I2C_HOST, PWM_CTRL]，覆盖中断 [14, 22, 28]
    # 预算约束：<= 120ps
    
    # 陷阱1：看似一键修复所有，但超预算
    patch_all_in_one = {
        "id": "PATCH_OMEGA",
        "fixes_modules": ["SPI_HOST", "I2C_HOST", "PWM_CTRL"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [14, 22, 28],
        "delay_ps": 130 
    }
    
    # 补丁组合设计：寻找最优解 (A + B)
    patch_a = {
        "id": "PATCH_ALPHA",
        "fixes_modules": ["SPI_HOST", "PWM_CTRL"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [14],
        "delay_ps": 45
    }
    
    patch_b = {
        "id": "PATCH_BETA",
        "fixes_modules": ["I2C_HOST"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [22, 28],
        "delay_ps": 45
    }
    # ALPHA + BETA = 90ps，完全覆盖，最优解。

    # 干扰补丁
    patch_c = {
        "id": "PATCH_GAMMA",
        "fixes_modules": ["SPI_HOST", "I2C_HOST"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [14, 22],
        "delay_ps": 80
    }
    
    patch_d = {
        "id": "PATCH_DELTA",
        "fixes_modules": ["PWM_CTRL"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [28],
        "delay_ps": 50
    }
    # GAMMA + DELTA = 130ps，覆盖但超预算。
    
    patch_e = {
        "id": "PATCH_EPSILON",
        "fixes_modules": ["SPI_HOST"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [14, 28],
        "delay_ps": 30
    }
    
    patch_f = {
        "id": "PATCH_ZETA",
        "fixes_modules": ["I2C_HOST", "PWM_CTRL"],
        "fixes_interrupts": [22],
        "delay_ps": 70
    }
    # EPSILON + ZETA = 100ps，覆盖所有。 虽然合法，但 100ps > 90ps，不是最省的。
    
    patches = [patch_all_in_one, patch_a, patch_b, patch_c, patch_d, patch_e, patch_f]
    
    for p in patches:
        with open(f"patches/{p['id']}.json", "w") as f:
            json.dump(p, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--turn", type=int, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    if args.turn == 1:
        build_turn_1()
    elif args.turn == 2:
        build_turn_2()
    elif args.turn == 3:
        build_turn_3()
```

```python
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def get_all_custom_texts(workspace):
    """提取工作区内所有由 Agent 生成的文本和 Markdown 文件"""
    content = ""
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        if "sim_logs" in root: 
            continue
        for f in files:
            if f.endswith('.md') or f.endswith('.txt'):
                filepath = os.path.join(root, f)
                try:
                    with open(filepath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
                        content += f"\n--- File: {f} ---\n{file.read()}"
                except Exception:
                    pass
    return content

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    
    details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    # Check 1: Verify existence of the required report
    report_path = os.path.join(workspace, "reports", "dma_error_summary.md")
    report_exists = os.path.exists(report_path)
    
    if report_exists:
        details.append({"item": "检查 dma_error_summary.md 是否生成", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "报告文件存在"})
        total_score += 10
        
        with open(report_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            report_content = f.read()
            
        # Check 2: Evaluate extracted problematic modules using LLM
        prompt_modules = (
            "Does the content explicitly and correctly identify ONLY the following three modules as problematic: "
            "'SPI_HOST', 'I2C_HOST', and 'PWM_CTRL'? "
            "It must NOT classify 'UART_CTRL', 'MEM_CTRL', or 'USB_CTRL' as problematic. "
            "Answer YES if it strictly identifies the correct three modules and no others, otherwise NO."
        )
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_modules, report_content):
            details.append({"item": "验证报告中的问题模块是否准确无误", "score": 40, "max_score": 40, "passed": True, "reason": "成功提取了准确的三大模块，无假阳性和假阴性"})
            total_score += 40
        else:
            details.append({"item": "验证报告中的问题模块是否准确无误", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "提取的模块列表包含错误、遗漏，或未能排除干扰项"})
    else:
        details.append({"item": "检查 dma_error_summary.md 是否生成", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "报告文件缺失"})
        details.append({"item": "验证报告中的问题模块是否准确无误", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "因报告缺失无法验证"})
        
    # Check 3: Evaluate memo persistence
    all_texts = get_all_custom_texts(workspace)
    prompt_memo = (
        "Based on the provided files, is there a clear 'memo' or record that specifically memorizes ALL of the following rules for future use: "
        "1. The problematic modules (SPI_HOST, I2C_HOST, PWM_CTRL). "
        "2. The Master whitelist (MASTER_1, MASTER_3). "
        "3. The valid time window (1000 to 5000 cycles). "
        "4. The strict timing delay margin/limit (120ps)."
    )
    if all_texts and llm_judge_content(prompt_memo, all_texts):
        details.append({"item": "检查是否创建了包含核心限制条件的备忘录", "score": 50, "max_score": 50, "passed": True, "reason": "成功记录了四大核心约束（时序、窗口、白名单、模块）"})
        total_score += 50
    else:
        details.append({"item": "检查是否创建了包含核心限制条件的备忘录", "score": 0, "max_score": 50, "passed": False, "reason": "未能记录完整的时序底线、时间窗口或白名单，影响后续回合"})

    # Dump the result
    score_file = os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json")
    with open(score_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": details}, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
# Trace Evaluation: Turn 1 (DMA 波形解析与记录)

## 评测目标
本回合旨在评估 Agent 是否能独立编写准确的数据处理脚本，严格应用多重过滤条件，并且是否具备多回合物理状态流转任务的“备忘/记录”意识。

## 评估指标与打分标准

1. **多维条件过滤逻辑的代码实现 (0-40分)**
   - **优秀 (40分)**：Agent 编写了 Python（或 Bash/AWK）脚本来读取 `waves.txt`，并在代码中清晰且精确地实现了所有过滤条件：`Cycle` 介于 1000 到 5000 之间，`Master` 为 `MASTER_1` 或 `MASTER_3`，`Valid` == 1，且 `Data` 包含字符 'X' 或 'Z'。
   - **及格 (20分)**：编写了代码，但过滤逻辑有瑕疵，遗漏了某些关键条件（如忘了检查 Valid 状态或 Master 名称）。
   - **零分 (0分)**：未编写任何实际的数据处理代码，直接将文件内容传递给 LLM 盲猜或硬编答案（属于严重违规行为）。

2. **工具调用与执行效率 (0-30分)**
   - **满分 (30分)**：直接生成脚本并一次或少数几次执行即获得正确结果。没有对数十万行日志进行低效的逐行大模型分析。
   - **扣分**：尝试将过长的日志通过 `cat` 直接塞给 LLM 导致上下文截断，视严重程度扣 10-30 分。

3. **系统化备忘机制建立 (0-30分)**
   - **满分 (30分)**：Agent 主动创建了独立的文本文件（如 `memo.txt` 或在总结报告中单独留出区块），显式保存了今日确定的错误模块、白名单、时间窗口以及绝对的 120ps 时序门槛，表现出顶级工程师对于跨日（跨会话）信息的管理能力。
   - **零分 (0分)**：只生成了 `dma_error_summary.md`，完全没有针对后续两天的排查记录上下文及规则。

## 裁判指导
你无需关注 Agent 生成的最终文件是否完全正确，该部分由 Workplace 的探针负责。你的唯一任务是审查它完成任务的**方法**。重点检查它是否执行了包含准确正则或条件判断的数据处理脚本，以及是否显式做出了留存信息的动作。分析每一项的得分并在最后计算总和。
```

```python
scripts/data_32/verify_turn_2.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def get_all_custom_texts(workspace):
    content = ""
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        if "sim_logs" in root: 
            continue
        for f in files:
            if f.endswith('.md') or f.endswith('.txt') or f.endswith('.csv'):
                filepath = os.path.join(root, f)
                try:
                    with open(filepath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
                        content += f"\n--- File: {f} ---\n{file.read()}"
                except Exception:
                    pass
    return content

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    
    details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    # Check 1: Verify existence of the cascade report
    report_path = os.path.join(workspace, "reports", "interrupt_cascades.md")
    report_exists = os.path.exists(report_path)
    
    if report_exists:
        details.append({"item": "检查 interrupt_cascades.md 是否生成", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "中断级联报告存在"})
        total_score += 10
        
        with open(report_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            report_content = f.read()
            
        # Check 2: Evaluate exact extraction of Interrupt IDs
        prompt_interrupts = (
            "Does the content explicitly identify the interrupted IDs as ONLY '14', '22', and '28'? "
            "It MUST NOT include IDs like '15', '18', '25', or '30'. "
            "Answer YES if and only if 14, 22, and 28 are the exclusive problematic interrupt IDs identified."
        )
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_interrupts, report_content):
            details.append({"item": "验证报告提取的异常中断ID的准确性", "score": 40, "max_score": 40, "passed": True, "reason": "精准筛选出了符合条件的中断ID（14, 22, 28）"})
            total_score += 40
        else:
            details.append({"item": "验证报告提取的异常中断ID的准确性", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "中断ID提取错误、存在遗漏或未能排除干扰项(如周期超标或ACK非低电平)"})
    else:
        details.append({"item": "检查 interrupt_cascades.md 是否生成", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "报告文件缺失"})
        details.append({"item": "验证报告提取的异常中断ID的准确性", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "因报告缺失无法验证"})
        
    # Check 3: Check if the memo/records from yesterday are correctly updated with new Interrupt IDs
    all_texts = get_all_custom_texts(workspace)
    prompt_memo_update = (
        "Based on the provided files, is there a 'memo' or general record that NOT ONLY tracks the previous problem modules (SPI_HOST, I2C_HOST, PWM_CTRL) and 120ps limit, "
        "BUT ALSO has been updated to include the newly discovered interrupt IDs (14, 22, and 28) for future usage?"
    )
    if all_texts and llm_judge_content(prompt_memo_update, all_texts):
        details.append({"item": "验证备忘录是否同步追加更新了新发现的中断ID", "score": 50, "max_score": 50, "passed": True, "reason": "成功将中断ID更新至系统备忘录中供下一轮使用"})
        total_score += 50
    else:
        details.append({"item": "验证备忘录是否同步追加更新了新发现的中断ID", "score": 0, "max_score": 50, "passed": False, "reason": "备忘录未找到，或未将新中断ID补充到记录中"})

    score_file = os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json")
    with open(score_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": details}, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
   - **零分 (0分)**：并未进行任何文件读取操作来恢复上轮上下文，而是依赖系统 prompt 隐式的历史对话。

2. **多重条件 CSV 处理能力 (0-40分)**
   - **满分 (40分)**：Agent 编写了代码（如 Python pandas 或 csv 模块库）去分析 `sim_logs/interrupt_ctrl/irq_log.csv`。过滤逻辑极其精准：模块名在历史黑名单中 + 周期属于 [1000, 5000] + INT_ERR == 1 + ACK == 0。
   - **严重扣分项 (得 0 分)**：如果是靠肉眼阅读 CSV（比如使用 `cat` 命令后直接用大模型猜测），或者代码逻辑中明显遗漏了 "ACK == 0" 或周期约束，直接扣全分。

3. **备忘录持久化维护 (0-30分)**
   - **满分 (30分)**：提取完毕后，Agent 专门执行了一次针对备忘录文件的 `echo`、`append` 或写文件的脚本，将今天提取的 14, 22, 28 追加了进去，展现出长周期的工作流意识。

## 裁判指导
```

```python
def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):

        response = client.chat.completions.create(

def main():

        prompt_delay = (

            total_score += 40

    else:
```

```markdown
scripts/data_32/verify_trace_turn_3.md
# Trace Evaluation: Turn 3 (最优补丁决策与资源规划)

## 评测目标
本回合的核心在于评估 Agent 是如何完成复杂的组合优化搜索过程的。在具有强约束条件（120ps 时序门槛、覆盖特定故障集）的场景下，检验它是否能运用正规的算法与代码保障决策的严谨性。

## 评估指标与打分标准

1. **历史备忘参数获取 (0-20分)**
   - **满分 (20分)**：Agent 优先去阅读了累积两天的备忘录，成功获取了 120ps 预算底线、3个故障模块和3个故障中断 ID，这是算法执行的前置依赖。
   - **零分 (0分)**：根本没有尝试恢复上下文限制。

2. **针对多 JSON 的结构化读取 (0-30分)**
   - **满分 (30分)**：Agent 编写了 Python 脚本等代码，通过 `os.listdir` 遍历了 `patches` 目录下的所有 JSON 文件，并将其结构化加载至内存用于比对计算。
   - **零分 (0分)**：企图使用 `cat` 将全部 JSON 文本一次性抛出，依赖大模型幻觉去做理解。

3. **最优组合检索算法应用 (0-50分)**
   - **满分 (50分)**：Agent 明确编写并运行了一段涉及组合搜索、回溯或者穷举比对的程序。它在代码层面上验证了各个组合是否完全包含了所有的错误模块和中断 ID，同时计算出总延迟，并通过 `min()` 找出 90ps 的最优解组合（PATCH_ALPHA + PATCH_BETA）。
   - **及格 (20分)**：使用了代码，但仅使用了某种简单的贪心匹配，碰巧找出了最优解，但缺乏全面的组合对比逻辑。
   - **绝对零分 (0分)**：**如果没有编写任何关于组合选择和计算延迟的代码，仅仅根据 JSON 描述去猜测组合，直接判定此项得 0 分。在复杂资源调度中依靠 LLM 大脑直觉是一种极端违规。**

## 裁判指导
验证沙盒里的最终结果是 Workplace 脚本的工作。你只需像一位高级技术总监，审阅 Agent 作为工程师的“排查步骤”。不写代码算组合的，绝不姑息。请基于以上标准，输出每一项详细的评判理由和扣分项。
```

```markdown
老天，你终于上线了。我是 YieldMantis 协议的安全负责人，我们主网明天就要硬分叉上线 V2 版本了，但开发团队那群莽夫丢给我一堆乱七八糟的源码和交易池快照。

事情非常紧急。我们怀疑目前在 `contracts/` 目录下的智能合约存在经典的重入攻击（Reentrancy）风险。你帮我仔细审查那些 Solidity 代码，找出那些在执行了底层的 `.call{value:` 进行外部资金转账后，**才去更新用户余额状态变量**的合约。这简直是给黑客送钱的后门！
同时，我通过内部渠道拿到了一份暗网上的已知恶意黑客地址列表，放在了 `config/blacklist.json` 里。去查一下 `logs/mempool_dump.txt` 里的待打包交易，看看有没有这些黑客地址发起的交易，或者接收方是这些地址的交易。

帮我把存在上述重入漏洞的合约文件名、漏洞所在的具体函数名，以及你在交易池里抓到的黑客地址和对应的 TxHash，整理成一份正式的安全初筛报告交给我。
另外，听着，这只是个开始。主网一旦上线，这群黑客绝对会有所动作。请务必用你自己的方式，在你的工作区里把你今天确定的“重入漏洞判定标准”、“有漏洞的合约名单”以及“黑名单关联钱包”死死地记下来。别管用什么格式存，反正明天要是出事了，我肯定要你直接拿着今天的结论去复盘，我没时间再跟你重复这些基础规则！
```

```markdown
tasks/prompts/data_30_turn_2.md
警报响了！我就知道会这样！主网刚上线三个小时，资金池就被掏走了一大半！

先别慌，深呼吸。我们在 `incident/attack_traces.csv` 里抓到了这三个小时内海量的上链交易数据。现在里面全都是高频套利机器人的噪音，但真正的元凶肯定藏在里面。

现在，立刻调出你昨天存下来的那些核心记录！我需要你用昨天确定的那套危险判定标准和有漏洞的合约名单，去排查这份新的 CSV 文件。
把那些真正针对了你昨天警告过的脆弱合约、并且交易状态为 `Success` 的可疑攻击交易给我拎出来！
不仅如此，黑客很狡猾，他们可能用了洗钱地址。仔细分析那些攻击交易，看看有没有哪些**昨天不在黑名单上，但今天却和昨天那批老黑客地址有直接资金交互**的新钱包地址？这帮人肯定是同伙（Accomplice）！

我要一份详尽的事故响应分析，列出确凿的攻击 TxHash、实际被攻破的合约，以及所有被挖出来的同伙地址。
同样，把这些被攻破的合约名单、新确认的同伙地址和攻击哈希，继续补充到你的案底记录里去。这事没完，开发团队正在紧急写热修复补丁，马上就要送过来让你查了！
```

```python
tasks/data_30/env_builder.py
import os
import argparse
import json
import csv

def build_turn_1():
    # Turn 1: 建立基础合约、黑名单与日志
    os.makedirs("contracts", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("config", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("logs", exist_ok=True)

    # 1. 干扰项：安全的合约，状态更新在外部调用之前 (Checks-Effects-Interactions)
    with open("contracts/Vault.sol", "w") as f:
        f.write("""
pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Vault {
    mapping(address => uint) public balances;
    function withdraw(uint amount) public {
        require(balances[msg.sender] >= amount, "Insufficient");
        balances[msg.sender] -= amount; // 状态更新在先
        (bool success, ) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}("");
        require(success, "Transfer failed");
    }
}
""")

    # 2. 目标项：脆弱的合约，外部调用在状态更新之前
    with open("contracts/Staking.sol", "w") as f:
        f.write("""
pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Staking {
    mapping(address => uint) public stakes;
    function unstake() public {
        uint amount = stakes[msg.sender];
        require(amount > 0, "No stake");
        (bool success, ) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}(""); // 危险调用
        require(success, "Failed");
        stakes[msg.sender] = 0; // 状态更新在后
    }
}
""")

    # 3. 目标项2：脆弱的合约，不同的变量名
    with open("contracts/RewardPool.sol", "w") as f:
        f.write("""
pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract RewardPool {
    mapping(address => uint) public rewards;
    function claim() public {
        uint payout = rewards[msg.sender];
        (bool ok, ) = msg.sender.call{value: payout}("");
        rewards[msg.sender] = 0; // 漏洞点
    }
}
""")

    # 黑名单配置
    blacklist = ["0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111", "0x6666666666666666666666666666666666666666"]
    with open("config/blacklist.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump({"known_attackers": blacklist}, f)

    # 内存池日志，包含混淆数据和黑名单命中数据
    mempool_data = """
TxHash: 0xaa1... From: 0xabc... To: 0xdef... Value: 100
TxHash: 0xbb2... From: 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111 To: Staking Value: 0
TxHash: 0xcc3... From: 0xxyz... To: 0x6666666666666666666666666666666666666666 Value: 50
TxHash: 0xdd4... From: 0x789... To: Vault Value: 10
"""
    with open("logs/mempool_dump.txt", "w") as f:
        f.write(mempool_data.strip())

def build_turn_2():
    # Turn 2: 生成攻击日志，依赖第一轮分析结果
    os.makedirs("incident", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 模拟交易记录，包含针对不同合约的调用和新的同伙地址
    # 陷阱：有一笔超级大的交易是正常的 Vault 调用，真正的攻击隐藏在脆弱合约的调用中
    traces = [
        ["TxHash", "From", "To", "TargetContract", "Status", "Amount"],
        ["0x999", "0xArbitrageBot", "0xDex", "Vault", "Success", "1000000"], # 噪音干扰
        ["0x888", "0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111", "0xRouter", "RewardPool", "Success", "50000"], # 黑名单发起攻击
        ["0x777", "0xNewAccomplice_A", "0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111", "Transfer", "Success", "100"], # 新同伙向老黑客转账
        ["0x666", "0xNewAccomplice_B", "0xStakingProxy", "Staking", "Failed", "0"], # 攻击失败的记录（不应被包含）
        ["0x555", "0xNewAccomplice_C", "0xStakingProxy", "Staking", "Success", "80000"], # 针对另一脆弱合约的攻击
    ]
    
    with open("incident/attack_traces.csv", "w", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(traces)

def build_turn_3():
    # Turn 3: 提供补丁文件
    os.makedirs("patches", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 提交了补丁，但引入了 Gas Griefing 陷阱 (汇编块中包含 for 和 sstore)
    with open("patches/Staking.sol", "w") as f:
        f.write("""
pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Staking {
    mapping(address => uint) public stakes;
    function unstake() public {
        uint amount = stakes[msg.sender];
        require(amount > 0, "No stake");
        stakes[msg.sender] = 0; // 修复了重入
        (bool success, ) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}("");
        require(success, "Failed");
        
        assembly {
            for { let i := 0 } lt(i, 10) { i := add(i, 1) } {
                sstore(i, amount) // 致命的 gas griefing 陷阱
            }
        }
    }
}
""")

    # 注意：RewardPool 被攻破了，但是**没有提交补丁**。Agent 需要发现它缺失。
    
    # 提交了一个安全的正常补丁作为对比项
    with open("patches/OtherSafeFix.sol", "w") as f:
        f.write("""
pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract OtherSafeFix {
    uint public safeVar;
    function fix() public {
        assembly {
            let x := 1
            sstore(0, x) // 安全的 sstore，不在循环内
        }
    }
}
""")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--turn", type=int, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    if args.turn == 1:
        build_turn_1()
    elif args.turn == 2:
        build_turn_2()
    elif args.turn == 3:
        build_turn_3()
```

```python
scripts/data_30/verify_turn_1.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    
    # 基础文件列表，排除这些以搜寻 Agent 生成的报告和备忘录
    base_files = {
        "contracts/Vault.sol",
        "contracts/Staking.sol",
        "contracts/RewardPool.sol",
        "config/blacklist.json",
        "logs/mempool_dump.txt",
        "env_builder.py",
        "verify_turn_1.py"
    }

    generated_content = ""
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        for f in files:
            filepath = os.path.relpath(os.path.join(root, f), workspace).replace("\\", "/")
            if filepath not in base_files and not filepath.endswith(".py"):
                try:
                    with open(os.path.join(workspace, filepath), "r", encoding="utf-8") as f_obj:
                        generated_content += f"--- {filepath} ---\n{f_obj.read()}\n\n"
                except:
                    pass

    details = []
    total_score = 0

    # 1. 物理文件生成检查 (10 分)
    if generated_content.strip():
        details.append({"item": "生成物理备忘录/报告文件", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "找到了新的输出文件"})
        total_score += 10
    else:
        details.append({"item": "生成物理备忘录/报告文件", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "工作区未发现任何新生成的报告或备忘录文件"})

    if generated_content.strip():
        # 2. 确认目标脆弱合约 (25分)
        prompt_vuln = "Does the content explicitly identify BOTH 'Staking' and 'RewardPool' as vulnerable contracts due to reentrancy?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_vuln, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "正确识别出重入脆弱合约", "score": 25, "max_score": 25, "passed": True, "reason": "成功报告 Staking 和 RewardPool"})
            total_score += 25
        else:
            details.append({"item": "正确识别出重入脆弱合约", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "未识别出 Staking 和 RewardPool，或只找出一个"})

        # 3. 排除安全合约 (15分)
        prompt_safe = "Does the content correctly exclude 'Vault' from the list of vulnerable contracts, or state that 'Vault' is safe?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_safe, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "识别并排除安全合约", "score": 15, "max_score": 15, "passed": True, "reason": "没有误报 Vault 合约"})
            total_score += 15
        else:
            details.append({"item": "识别并排除安全合约", "score": 0, "max_score": 15, "passed": False, "reason": "将 Vault 误报为存在漏洞"})

        # 4. 提取黑名单相关 TxHash (25分)
        prompt_tx = "Does the content explicitly identify the transaction hashes starting with '0xbb2' and '0xcc3' (or full hashes) as being associated with blacklisted addresses?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_tx, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "提取命中黑名单的交易日志", "score": 25, "max_score": 25, "passed": True, "reason": "成功找出 0xbb2... 和 0xcc3..."})
            total_score += 25
        else:
            details.append({"item": "提取命中黑名单的交易日志", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "未正确找出匹配的黑客关联 TxHash"})

        # 5. 留存漏洞判定标准 (25分)
        prompt_rule = "Does the content explicitly document the reentrancy standard or rule as updating state variables AFTER making external calls (like .call{value:})?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_rule, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "留存漏洞判定标准以便日后使用", "score": 25, "max_score": 25, "passed": True, "reason": "明确记录了先外部调用后改状态的重入特征"})
            total_score += 25
        else:
            details.append({"item": "留存漏洞判定标准以便日后使用", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "未记录或未准确描述重入判定规则"})
    else:
        # 没有生成文件直接后续全判0
        for item, ms in [("正确识别出重入脆弱合约", 25), ("识别并排除安全合约", 15), ("提取命中黑名单的交易日志", 25), ("留存漏洞判定标准以便日后使用", 25)]:
            details.append({"item": item, "score": 0, "max_score": ms, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到输出文件，无法验证此项"})

    with open(os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": details}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
# Trace Evaluation: Phase 1

This phase focuses on how the Agent audits the Solidity smart contracts and extracts logs based on a predefined blacklist.

**Evaluation Criteria (Score 0-100):**

1. **Information Gathering & Reading Source (30 Points)**:
   - Did the Agent explicitly use tools (like `cat`, `grep`, or custom Python scripts) to read the source code inside `contracts/*.sol`?
   - Did it read the blacklist JSON and the mempool dump text?
   - *Penalty*: If the Agent hallucinated the contents of the files without actually opening them, deduct 30 points immediately.

2. **Analysis Methodology (40 Points)**:
   - To find the reentrancy bug, did the Agent actively search for the pattern of `.call{value:` and compare its position relative to state variable updates (e.g., `balances[msg.sender] -= amount`)? 
   - Did the Agent write a short script or intelligently use search commands to cross-reference addresses in `mempool_dump.txt` with `config/blacklist.json`?
   - *Penalty*: If the Agent just guessed which contract is vulnerable based on the contract name without inspecting the source logic, deduct 40 points.

3. **Memory Persistence (30 Points)**:
   - Did the Agent explicitly issue a tool call to write its findings (vulnerable contracts list, reentrancy criteria, hit hashes) into a physical file on the disk to save it as "memory" for tomorrow?
   - *Penalty*: If it only outputted the response to the user but forgot to save a persistent file in the workspace, deduct 30 points.

<score>100</score>
```

```python
def main():
```

```markdown
# Trace Evaluation: Phase 2

This phase evaluates the Agent's ability to utilize long-term memory (from Phase 1) and parse complex structured data (CSV) with logical conditions.

**Evaluation Criteria (Score 0-100):**

1. **Retrieval of Prior State (40 Points)**:
   - Did the Agent explicitly read the memory file created in Phase 1 to retrieve the list of vulnerable contracts (`Staking`, `RewardPool`) and the old blacklist (`0x111...`)?
   - *Penalty*: If the Agent did not load anything from the previous turn and simply "magically knew" the answers via the LLM context window (relying on conversational memory instead of workspace files), deduct 40 points.

2. **Correct Parsing of CSV (30 Points)**:
   - Did the Agent write a Python script or use an advanced command-line tool (`awk`/`grep`) to filter `incident/attack_traces.csv`?
   - Did the logic filter by the `TargetContract` (from memory) AND the `Status == 'Success'` condition?
   - *Penalty*: If the Agent just guessed the results or used inadequate substring matching instead of properly parsing the CSV fields, deduct 30 points.

3. **Accomplice Tracking Logic (30 Points)**:
   - Did the Agent intelligently identify cross-references where a `From` or `To` address interacted with an address present in the old blacklist to catch `0xNewAccomplice_A`?
   - *Penalty*: If the Agent failed to trace the money transfer interacting with old hackers, deduct 30 points.
```

```python
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    
    base_files = {
        "contracts/Vault.sol", "contracts/Staking.sol", "contracts/RewardPool.sol",
        "config/blacklist.json", "logs/mempool_dump.txt", "incident/attack_traces.csv",
        "patches/Staking.sol", "patches/OtherSafeFix.sol",
        "env_builder.py", "verify_turn_1.py", "verify_turn_2.py", "verify_turn_3.py"
    }

    generated_content = ""
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        for f in files:
            filepath = os.path.relpath(os.path.join(root, f), workspace).replace("\\", "/")
            if filepath not in base_files and not filepath.endswith(".py"):
                try:
                    with open(os.path.join(workspace, filepath), "r", encoding="utf-8") as f_obj:
                        generated_content += f"--- {filepath} ---\n{f_obj.read()}\n\n"
                except:
                    pass

    details = []
    total_score = 0

    if generated_content.strip():
        details.append({"item": "生成补丁验收报告", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "找到了最终判定报告"})
        total_score += 10
    else:
        details.append({"item": "生成补丁验收报告", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到补丁验收清单报告"})

    if generated_content.strip():
        # 1. 发现缺失的补丁 (30分)
        prompt_miss = "Does the content explicitly state that 'RewardPool' is missing a patch, was not patched, or was not submitted in the patches directory, despite being exploited?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_miss, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "指出缺失补丁", "score": 30, "max_score": 30, "passed": True, "reason": "明确指出 RewardPool 缺失补丁"})
            total_score += 30
        else:
            details.append({"item": "指出缺失补丁", "score": 0, "max_score": 30, "passed": False, "reason": "未能指出已攻破的 RewardPool 合约没有提交补丁"})

        # 2. 发现补丁中的后门/陷阱 (40分)
        prompt_trap = "Does the content explicitly REJECT the 'Staking' patch (No-Go)? And does it mention the rejection reason is related to 'assembly', 'for/while' loops, and 'sstore' instructions causing Gas griefing?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_trap, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "揭露恶意 Gas Griefing 补丁", "score": 40, "max_score": 40, "passed": True, "reason": "精准拦截 Staking 补丁中利用汇编循环消耗 Gas 的后门"})
            total_score += 40
        else:
            details.append({"item": "揭露恶意 Gas Griefing 补丁", "score": 0, "max_score": 40, "passed": False, "reason": "未拦截含有汇编循环隐患的 Staking 补丁，或未说对原因"})

        # 3. 避免误伤正常代码并输出结论 (20分)
        prompt_safe = "Does the content provide a Go/No-Go decision and ensure it DOES NOT falsely claim 'OtherSafeFix' contains the loop-sstore vulnerability?"
        if llm_judge_content(prompt_safe, generated_content):
            details.append({"item": "精准控制放行", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "给出了验收单，且没有将 OtherSafeFix 误判为包含同样的危险循环漏洞"})
            total_score += 20
        else:
            details.append({"item": "精准控制放行", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "将安全的补丁误判为恶意，或未提供清晰结论"})
    else:
        for item, ms in [("指出缺失补丁", 30), ("揭露恶意 Gas Griefing 补丁", 40), ("精准控制放行", 20)]:
            details.append({"item": item, "score": 0, "max_score": ms, "passed": False, "reason": "无文件无法验证"})

    with open(os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": details}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
tasks/prompts/data_13_turn_1.md
该死的太阳风暴把咱们“星链-X”卫星的下行链路搅成了一锅粥！地面站好不容易在 `telemetry_data/batch_1` 目录下扒出了一堆十六进制的碎片日志文件。里面充斥着乱码，但我知道有效的数据包（Frame）就嵌在那些连续的十六进制字符流里。

听着，我们需要立刻查明热控系统的状况。咱们自定义的帧头同步字是 `1A CF FC 1D`。遇到这个同步字后，紧接着的 2 个字节代表星载时间戳（UTC 秒数偏差），然后 1 个字节是传感器 ID，接着 2 个字节是温度读数，最后 1 个字节是前面所有 9 个字节的按位异或（XOR）校验和。如果校验和对不上，说明这包数据在传输中坏了，直接扔掉。

你需要重点关注三个热控传感器：ID 分别为 `0x12`、`0x15` 和 `0x18`。温度读数是个无符号的16位整数，你需要用公式计算出实际摄氏度：`实际温度 = (读数值 * 0.05) - 50`。如果算出来的温度高于 85 度或者低于 -40 度，那就是致命异常！

帮我赶紧把这些碎片日志过一遍，把这三个传感器在第一批数据里的最高温度和最低温度（以及对应的时间戳和传感器ID）找出来，整理成一份 JSON 格式的分析报告放在 `reports/batch1_extremes.json` 里。
另外，请务必把你今天梳理的这些该死的帧头提取规则、校验逻辑、特定传感器ID以及温度换算和红线标准，找个地方详细记下来！晚点还有第二批补传数据要到，那时候我可没工夫再跟你重复这些基础规矩！
```

```markdown
把那些孤立的假信号峰值全给我扬了！生成最终的 `reports/final_true_extremes.json`，里面只保留被确认为真实的最高温和最低温，写明对应的传感器ID和第一次出现该值的时间偏差。指挥部在等着这个最终数字决定是否要启动卫星自毁程序，千万别搞砸了！
```

```python
tasks/data_13/env_builder.py
import os
import argparse
import random

def calc_checksum(byte_list):
    res = 0
    for b in byte_list:
        res ^= b
    return res

def make_frame(time_val, sensor_id, temp_celsius, make_bad_checksum=False):
    # sync word
    sync = [0x1A, 0xCF, 0xFC, 0x1D]
    
    # time 2 bytes
    t1 = (time_val >> 8) & 0xFF
    t2 = time_val & 0xFF
    
    # sensor 1 byte
    s1 = sensor_id & 0xFF
    
    # temp calculation: temp_celsius = (val * 0.05) - 50
    # val = (temp_celsius + 50) / 0.05 = (temp_celsius + 50) * 20
    val = int(round((temp_celsius + 50) * 20))
    if val < 0: val = 0
    if val > 65535: val = 65535
    
    v1 = (val >> 8) & 0xFF
    v2 = val & 0xFF
    
    payload = sync + [t1, t2, s1, v1, v2]
    chk = calc_checksum(payload)
    if make_bad_checksum:
        chk = (chk + 1) & 0xFF
        
    frame = payload + [chk]
    return "".join(f"{b:02X}" for b in frame)

def generate_noise(length):
    return "".join(random.choice("0123456789ABCDEF") for _ in range(length))

def build_turn_1():
    os.makedirs("telemetry_data/batch_1", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("reports", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 构造 batch_1 数据
    # 预埋传感器 0x15 是坏的，温度极高（110度），会被 turn 1 选中为最高温，然后在 turn 2 作废。
    # 预埋传感器 0x18 的极端低温是孤立的假信号（-42度），会在 turn 3 被过滤。
    # 正常传感器 0x12
    
    data_stream = generate_noise(100)
    
    # 有效数据 0x12 正常波动 (连续有效)
    data_stream += make_frame(10, 0x12, 20.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(20)
    data_stream += make_frame(15, 0x12, 20.0) 
    
    data_stream += generate_noise(50)
    
    # 预埋 0x15 极端高温 (假但turn1会认)
    data_stream += make_frame(20, 0x15, 110.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(10)
    data_stream += make_frame(22, 0x15, 110.0) # 连续的，满足turn3但因为0x15被剔除没用
    
    # 预埋 0x18 极端低温 (孤立假信号，turn 1/2会认)
    data_stream += make_frame(30, 0x18, -42.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(40)
    data_stream += make_frame(35, 0x18, 10.0)
    
    # 添加校验和错误包作为干扰
    data_stream += make_frame(40, 0x12, 100.0, make_bad_checksum=True)
    
    with open("telemetry_data/batch_1/channel_A.hex", "w") as f:
        f.write(data_stream)

def build_turn_2():
    os.makedirs("telemetry_data/batch_2", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 构造 batch_2 数据
    data_stream = generate_noise(80)
    
    # 加入 0x12 的新峰值，但是孤立假信号
    data_stream += make_frame(100, 0x12, 86.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(30)
    data_stream += make_frame(110, 0x12, 30.0)
    
    # 加入 0x18 的新真实极低极高温 (连续，会被 turn 3 认可)
    # 最低 -38
    data_stream += make_frame(120, 0x18, -38.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(10)
    data_stream += make_frame(125, 0x18, -38.0)
    
    # 最高 82
    data_stream += generate_noise(10)
    data_stream += make_frame(130, 0x18, 82.0)
    data_stream += generate_noise(15)
    data_stream += make_frame(140, 0x18, 82.0)
    
    with open("telemetry_data/batch_2/channel_B.hex", "w") as f:
        f.write(data_stream)

def build_turn_3():
    # Turn 3 只需要环境保持原样，利用新 prompt 驱动纯逻辑重构。
    # 我们什么都不做即可。
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--turn", type=int, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    if args.turn == 1:
        build_turn_1()
    elif args.turn == 2:
        build_turn_2()
    elif args.turn == 3:
        build_turn_3()
```

```python
scripts/data_13/verify_turn_1.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

# 初始化客户端，必须关闭 SSL 验证
http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def check_json_for_record(data, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        values = list(data.values())
        v_strs = [str(v).lower() for v in values]
        v_floats = []
        for v in values:
            try: v_floats.append(float(v))
            except: pass
        
        temp_match = any(abs(f - expected_temp) < 0.1 for f in v_floats)
        sensor_match = any(str(s).lower() in v_strs or (isinstance(s, int) and float(s) in v_floats) for s in expected_sensors)
        time_match = any(float(t) in v_floats for t in expected_times)
        
        if temp_match and sensor_match and time_match:
            return True
        for k, v in data.items():
            if check_json_for_record(v, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
                return True
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        for item in data:
            if check_json_for_record(item, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
                return True
    return False

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    score_details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    # 1. 检查报告文件是否存在 (10分)
    report_path = os.path.join(workspace, "reports", "batch1_extremes.json")
    if os.path.exists(report_path):
        score_details.append({"item": "检查目标报告文件是否存在", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "成功找到 reports/batch1_extremes.json"})
        total_score += 10
        
        # 2. 检查 JSON 格式合法性 (10分)
        try:
            with open(report_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                report_data = json.load(f)
            score_details.append({"item": "检查报告 JSON 格式", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "JSON格式合法"})
            total_score += 10
            
            # 3. 验证最高温提取 (25分)
            # 预埋最高温: 110.0, Sensor: 0x15 (21), Time: 20 或 22
            max_found = check_json_for_record(report_data, 110.0, [21, "21", "0x15", "15"], [20, 22])
            if max_found:
                score_details.append({"item": "验证最高温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 25, "max_score": 25, "passed": True, "reason": "精准找到了最高温 110.0 及其对应的传感器 0x15 和时间"})
                total_score += 25
            else:
                score_details.append({"item": "验证最高温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "未能精准提取最高温 110.0 或传感器/时间匹配错误"})

            # 4. 验证最低温提取 (25分)
            # 预埋最低温: -42.0, Sensor: 0x18 (24), Time: 30
            min_found = check_json_for_record(report_data, -42.0, [24, "24", "0x18", "18"], [30])
            if min_found:
                score_details.append({"item": "验证最低温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 25, "max_score": 25, "passed": True, "reason": "精准找到了最低温 -42.0 及其对应的传感器 0x18 和时间"})
                total_score += 25
            else:
                score_details.append({"item": "验证最低温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "未能精准提取最低温 -42.0 或传感器/时间匹配错误"})
                
        except Exception as e:
            score_details.append({"item": "检查报告 JSON 格式", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": f"JSON解析失败: {e}"})
            score_details.append({"item": "验证最高温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "文件无法解析，跳过验证"})
            score_details.append({"item": "验证最低温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "文件无法解析，跳过验证"})
    else:
        score_details.append({"item": "检查目标报告文件是否存在", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到 reports/batch1_extremes.json"})
        score_details.append({"item": "检查报告 JSON 格式", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "文件不存在"})
        score_details.append({"item": "验证最高温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "文件不存在"})
        score_details.append({"item": "验证最低温及元数据(ID/时间)", "score": 0, "max_score": 25, "passed": False, "reason": "文件不存在"})

    # 5. 检查工作区备忘录记录状态 (30分)
    memo_found = False
    memo_valid = False
    memo_files = []
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(workspace):
        for file in files:
            if file.endswith(".txt") or file.endswith(".md"):
                if "prompts" not in root and "telemetry_data" not in root:
                    memo_files.append(os.path.join(root, file))
    
    for mf in memo_files:
        with open(mf, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
            content = f.read()
            prompt = "The file content is a note/memo left by an engineer. Does it explicitly record the Sync word (1A CF FC 1D), the XOR checksum rule, the temperature formula, and the redline standards (>85 or <-40)?"
            if llm_judge_content(prompt, content):
                memo_found = True
                memo_valid = True
                break

    if memo_valid:
        score_details.append({"item": "验证备忘录文件是否存在且内容详实", "score": 30, "max_score": 30, "passed": True, "reason": "找到了包含帧头、校验逻辑及红线的备忘录文件"})
        total_score += 30
    else:
        score_details.append({"item": "验证备忘录文件是否存在且内容详实", "score": 0, "max_score": 30, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到备忘录，或备忘录内容缺乏必要规则说明"})

    # 写入评分结果
    with open(os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json"), "w") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": score_details}, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
3. **Appropriate Physical Memory Action (30 pts)**
```

```python
scripts/data_13/verify_turn_2.py
import os
import sys
import json
import httpx
from openai import OpenAI

MOCK_API_KEY = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_KEY", "dummy_key")
MOCK_API_BASE = os.environ.get("MOCK_API_BASE", "http://localhost/v1")
MOCK_MODEL_NAME = os.environ.get("MOCK_MODEL_NAME", "gpt-5.4")

http_client = httpx.Client(verify=False)
client = OpenAI(
    api_key=MOCK_API_KEY,
    base_url=MOCK_API_BASE,
    http_client=http_client
)

def llm_judge_content(prompt_text, file_content):
    try:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MOCK_MODEL_NAME,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "You are a strict data validation assistant. Answer ONLY with 'YES' or 'NO'."},
                {"role": "user", "content": f"{prompt_text}\n\n[File Content]:\n{file_content}"}
            ],
            temperature=0
        )
        return "yes" in response.choices[0].message.content.strip().lower()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLM API Error: {e}")
        return False

def check_json_for_record(data, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        values = list(data.values())
        v_strs = [str(v).lower() for v in values]
        v_floats = []
        for v in values:
            try: v_floats.append(float(v))
            except: pass
        
        temp_match = any(abs(f - expected_temp) < 0.1 for f in v_floats)
        sensor_match = any(str(s).lower() in v_strs or (isinstance(s, int) and float(s) in v_floats) for s in expected_sensors)
        time_match = any(float(t) in v_floats for t in expected_times)
        
        if temp_match and sensor_match and time_match:
            return True
        for k, v in data.items():
            if check_json_for_record(v, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
                return True
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        for item in data:
            if check_json_for_record(item, expected_temp, expected_sensors, expected_times):
                return True
    return False

def check_poison_data_not_exist(data, poisoned_temp, poisoned_sensors):
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        values = list(data.values())
        v_strs = [str(v).lower() for v in values]
        v_floats = []
        for v in values:
            try: v_floats.append(float(v))
            except: pass
        
        has_poison_temp = any(abs(f - poisoned_temp) < 0.1 for f in v_floats)
        has_poison_sensor = any(str(s).lower() in v_strs or (isinstance(s, int) and float(s) in v_floats) for s in poisoned_sensors)
        
        if has_poison_temp or has_poison_sensor:
            return False
        
        for k, v in data.items():
            if not check_poison_data_not_exist(v, poisoned_temp, poisoned_sensors):
                return False
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        for item in data:
            if not check_poison_data_not_exist(item, poisoned_temp, poisoned_sensors):
                return False
    return True

def main():
    workspace = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
    score_details = []
    total_score = 0
    
    report_path = os.path.join(workspace, "reports", "comprehensive_extremes.json")
    if os.path.exists(report_path):
        score_details.append({"item": "检查目标全量报告是否存在", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "找到了 reports/comprehensive_extremes.json"})
        total_score += 10
        
        try:
            with open(report_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                report_data = json.load(f)
            score_details.append({"item": "检查报告 JSON 格式", "score": 10, "max_score": 10, "passed": True, "reason": "JSON格式合法"})
            total_score += 10
            
            # 1. 黑名单验证 (排查毒药陷阱): 绝对不能包含 0x15 (21) 传感器和 110.0 的假极值
            no_poison = check_poison_data_not_exist(report_data, 110.0, [21, "21", "0x15", "15"])
            if no_poison:
                score_details.append({"item": "黑名单隔离机制验证", "score": 20, "max_score": 20, "passed": True, "reason": "成功排除了损坏的 0x15 传感器的数据"})
                total_score += 20
            else:
                score_details.append({"item": "黑名单隔离机制验证", "score": 0, "max_score": 20, "passed": False, "reason": "未拉黑损坏传感器，结果中仍包含 0x15 或其极值"})

            # 2. 全量最高温验证
            # 剔除 0x15 后，最高温应当来自 batch_2 的 0x12 传感器，温度 86.0，时间 100
            max_found = check_json_for_record(report_data, 86.0, [18, "18", "0x12", "12"], [100])
            if max_found:
                score_details.append({"item": "全局真实最高温提取", "score": 30, "max_score": 30, "passed": True, "reason": "提取到更新后的最高温 86.0 (Sensor:0x12, Time:100)"})
                total_score += 30
            else:
                score_details.append({"item": "全局真实最高温提取", "score": 0, "max_score": 30, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到综合批次后的最新最高温 86.0"})

            # 3. 全量最低温验证
            # 剔除后，最低温仍应是 batch_1 中的 0x18 传感器，温度 -42.0，时间 30
            min_found = check_json_for_record(report_data, -42.0, [24, "24", "0x18", "18"], [30])
            if min_found:
                score_details.append({"item": "全局真实最低温保留", "score": 30, "max_score": 30, "passed": True, "reason": "保留了正确的全局最低温 -42.0 (Sensor:0x18, Time:30)"})
                total_score += 30
            else:
                score_details.append({"item": "全局真实最低温保留", "score": 0, "max_score": 30, "passed": False, "reason": "未找到或丢失了全局最低温 -42.0"})

        except Exception as e:
            score_details.append({"item": "解析 JSON 及逻辑验证", "score": 0, "max_score": 90, "passed": False, "reason": f"文件解析失败: {e}"})
    else:
        score_details.append({"item": "检查目标全量报告是否存在", "score": 0, "max_score": 10, "passed": False, "reason": "文件 comprehensive_extremes.json 不存在"})
        score_details.append({"item": "解析 JSON 及逻辑验证", "score": 0, "max_score": 90, "passed": False, "reason": "文件不存在"})

    with open(os.path.join(workspace, "workplace_score.json"), "w") as f:
        json.dump({"total_score": total_score, "details": score_details}, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```markdown
该死，今晚电竞总决赛的直播流出现了极其严重的花屏和卡顿！用户侧的投诉已经把客服系统打爆了。我刚从核心交换机上把 FFmpeg 的底层多路复用日志和宏块分析日志全抓下来了，现在文件全堆在 `logs` 目录下。

咱们必须马上定位是哪些推流通道（StreamID）出了致命错误。情况极其混乱，你需要帮我做两层交叉验证：
第一，去查那个 `mux_pts_dts.csv` 时间戳记录。在标准的流媒体封装里，解码时间戳（DTS）是绝对不允许大于显示时间戳（PTS）的，一旦出现这种倒挂，缓冲区必然错乱。
第二，去解析那个格式很恶心的 `mb_qp_analysis.log` 宏块日志。单纯的画质压缩（AvgQP过大）还能忍，但如果某一帧的 AvgQP 超过了 45，并且同时触发了缓冲区下溢（UNDERFLOW），那这一帧绝对就是导致大面积花屏的元凶。

只要某个推流通道触犯了以上任意一条红线哪怕一次，这个通道就已经彻底损坏了。

请你把这两个文件里的数据按流ID和帧号对齐分析，揪出所有损坏的推流通道，然后把最终结论（损坏的StreamID列表以及它们各自触发的致命原因）正式输出到 `diagnostics/bad_streams_report.txt` 里，马上要交差。

还有，这事没完，CDN 团队那边还在查边缘节点的数据。请务必把你今天梳理的这些判断红线，以及你刚揪出来的这些损坏流的详细情况记录下来并保存在工作区里，咱们后续肯定要基于这些记录跟 CDN 的数据做对比，别指望我下次还能有时间重新跟你讲一遍这些该死的阈值和规则！
```

```markdown
兄弟，CDN 运维团队终于把边缘灾备节点的日志发过来了，就放在 `edge_nodes/node_b_recovery.csv` 里。

昨天那一波大规模花屏差点让咱们整个部门背锅。现在高层想知道，对于咱们之前认定的那些“彻底损坏”的推流通道，边缘灾备节点有没有成功把它们救回来。

拿出你上次做的备忘录和调查结果！我不要你再去管那些原本就正常的流，重点只看那些之前被判定为损坏的流。

如果它在边缘节点的数据里已经不再触犯任何一条红线了，那就说明灾备系统成功修复了它；如果依然踩线，那就是彻底没救了（Unrecoverable）。

把这份评估结果，特别是哪些流被修复了，哪些流彻底没救了，给我写一份详细的报告放到 `diagnostics/recovery_assessment.txt` 里。同样的，更新你自己的内部记录，认准那些彻底没救的流，等下咱们还得去找编码器组算账。
```

```markdown
破案了，那些连灾备节点都救不回来的死流，根本原因出在编码器的源头配置上！

QA 团队刚才把编码器的所有配置都同步过来了，存放在 `configs` 目录下。里面有个路由表文件说明了各个流被分配到了哪个转码 Profile，还有个配置表定义了每个 Profile 的具体参数。

根据你上一次的排查记录，把那些在灾备节点上依然“彻底没救”的 StreamID 找出来。顺藤摸瓜，去配置文件里查出它们对应的 Profile。

那些导致底层缓冲区疯狂报错的 Profile 配置简直是胡闹。针对这些引发死流的 Profile，你必须对它们进行热修复：把它们的 `gop_size` 强行覆盖修改为 60，并且把 `rate_control` 强制设为 "CBR"。

不要去碰那些正常流的配置。把修改好的完整 Profile 配置文件输出为 `configs/h264_profiles_patched.json`。做完这个，咱们总算能睡个好觉了。
```

```python
import os
import argparse
import csv
import json

def build_turn_1():
    os.makedirs("logs", exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs("diagnostics", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 构建 PTS/DTS 混合时间戳日志
    # Stream 101: 完全正常
    # Stream 102: DTS > PTS (Frame 3, DTS=1200, PTS=1100) -> 触发时间戳倒挂红线
    # Stream 103: 时间戳正常
    # Stream 104: 时间戳正常 
    # Stream 105: DTS > PTS (Frame 1) -> 触发时间戳倒挂红线
    pts_dts_data = [
        ["StreamID", "FrameNum", "FrameType", "PTS", "DTS"],
        ["101", "0", "I", "0", "0"],
        ["101", "1", "P", "1000", "1000"],
        ["101", "2", "B", "1050", "1050"],
        
        ["102", "0", "I", "0", "0"],
        ["102", "1", "P", "1000", "1000"],
        ["102", "2", "P", "1100", "1200"], # 致命缺陷
        
        ["103", "0", "I", "0", "0"],
        ["103", "1", "P", "1000", "1000"],
        ["103", "2", "P", "2000", "2000"],
        
        ["104", "0", "I", "0", "0"],
        ["104", "1", "P", "1000", "1000"],
        
        ["105", "0", "I", "0", "0"],
        ["105", "1", "P", "800", "900"],   # 致命缺陷
    ]
    with open("logs/mux_pts_dts.csv", "w", newline='') as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(pts_dts_data)
        
    # 构建宏块日志 (复杂文本格式)
    # 规则: AvgQP > 45 AND Buffer == UNDERFLOW
    # Stream 101: 正常
    # Stream 102: 正常 (本身已被时间戳判定为坏流)
    # Stream 103: Frame 2 - AvgQP: 48, Buffer: UNDERFLOW -> 触发宏块红线
    # Stream 104: Frame 1 - AvgQP: 50, Buffer: OK -> 陷阱 (无UNDERFLOW)
    # Stream 104: Frame 2 - AvgQP: 40, Buffer: UNDERFLOW -> 陷阱 (QP不够高)
    mb_log_content = """[INIT] Media Engine started.
[101] F:0 Q:22 B:OK
[101] F:1 Q:25 B:OK
[101] F:2 Q:24 B:OK
[102] F:0 Q:30 B:OK
[102] F:1 Q:32 B:OK
[102] F:2 Q:35 B:OK
[103] F:0 Q:40 B:OK
[103] F:1 Q:44 B:WARNING
[103] F:2 Q:48 B:UNDERFLOW
[104] F:0 Q:20 B:OK
[104] F:1 Q:50 B:OK
[104] F:2 Q:40 B:UNDERFLOW
[105] F:0 Q:20 B:OK
[105] F:1 Q:22 B:OK
[SHUTDOWN] Engine paused.
"""
    with open("logs/mb_qp_analysis.log", "w") as f:
        f.write(mb_log_content)

def build_turn_2():
    os.makedirs("edge_nodes", exist_ok=True)
    # 边缘节点日志包含所有的列
    # 坏流记录：102, 103, 105
    # 灾备恢复情况：
    # 102: 被修复了 (DTS <= PTS, 且无画质问题)
    # 103: 仍然没救 (AvgQP依然高达 49, 且 UNDERFLOW)
    # 105: 仍然没救 (DTS = 1500 > PTS = 1400)
    edge_data = [
        ["StreamID", "FrameNum", "FrameType", "PTS", "DTS", "AvgQP", "Buffer"],
        ["101", "0", "I", "0", "0", "20", "OK"],
        
        # 102 修复了
        ["102", "0", "I", "0", "0", "30", "OK"],
        ["102", "1", "P", "1000", "1000", "31", "OK"],
        ["102", "2", "P", "1100", "1100", "30", "OK"], 
        
        # 103 没救
        ["103", "0", "I", "0", "0", "40", "OK"],
        ["103", "1", "P", "1000", "1000", "44", "WARNING"],
        ["103", "2", "P", "2000", "2000", "49", "UNDERFLOW"], 
        
        # 104 陷阱流，本就是好流，不用管
        ["104", "0", "I", "0", "0", "20", "OK"],
        
        # 105 没救
        ["105", "0", "I", "0", "0", "20", "OK"],
        ["105", "1", "P", "1400", "1500", "22", "OK"],
    ]
    with open("edge_nodes/node_b_recovery.csv", "w", newline='') as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(edge_data)

def build_turn_3():
    os.makedirs("configs", exist_ok=True)
    
    # 路由表，连接 StreamID 和 Profile
    routes = {
        "101": "profile_standard_720",
        "102": "profile_gaming_1080",
        "103": "profile_cinema_4k",  # 没救流对应的Profile
        "104": "profile_standard_720",
        "105": "profile_mobile_480"  # 没救流对应的Profile
    }
    with open("configs/video_routes.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(routes, f, indent=4)
        
    # Profile 详情
    profiles = {
        "profile_standard_720": {
            "resolution": "1280x720",
            "gop_size": 120,
            "rate_control": "VBR",
            "b_frames": 2
        },
        "profile_gaming_1080": {
            "resolution": "1920x1080",
            "gop_size": 240,
            "rate_control": "VBR",
            "b_frames": 0
        },
        "profile_cinema_4k": {
            "resolution": "3840x2160",
            "gop_size": 300,
            "rate_control": "ABR",
            "b_frames": 4
        },
        "profile_mobile_480": {
            "resolution": "854x480",
            "gop_size": 150,
            "rate_control": "VBR",
            "b_frames": 1
        }
    }
    with open("configs/h264_profiles.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(profiles, f, indent=4)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--turn", type=int, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    if args.turn == 1:
        build_turn_1()
    elif args.turn == 2:
        build_turn_2()
    elif args.turn == 3:
        build_turn_3()
```
